author: lOrm
content: Issue calls for not silently absorbing PoisonError at three lock-acquisition sites in src/tools/bash/mod.rs:177/234/256 (currently unwrap_or_else(PoisonError::into_inner) hides post-panic data-structure corruption). The mandated fix is either propagating the poison as an error or documenting the panic-free invariants. Not addressable in this cleanup pass: src/tools/bash/mod.rs is in the change-set's forbidden-files list (also noted in #682 / #686 result comments referencing the same forbidden-files policy on src/subagent.rs and src/pipeline.rs). Real bug — should be revisited in a future change-set that includes bash/mod.rs in scope.
